action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level grid metrics including frequency, total demand, and the current stability index.

action_set_definitions.name: get_thermal_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all thermal power plants with their current operating status, current output, and maximum capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: get_storage_assets
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves status of battery energy storage systems, including current discharge rate, max discharge capacity, and stored energy.

action_set_definitions.name: set_thermal_output
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output of a specific thermal unit.

unit_id.description: The unique identifier of the thermal unit.

output_mw.description: The target power output in Megawatts.

action_set_definitions.name: set_storage_output
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the discharge rate of a specific battery storage unit.

unit_id.description: The unique identifier of the storage unit.

discharge_mw.description: The target discharge rate in Megawatts.

state_description.grid_frequency_hz: Current operating frequency of the grid (target: 50.0 or 60.0 Hz).
state_description.total_demand_mw: The current total power consumption demand from the grid in Megawatts.
state_description.thermal_plants: List of thermal power plants and their current operating status.
state_description.renewable_sources: Status of solar and wind generation assets.
state_description.energy_storage_mwh: Current energy stored in grid-scale battery systems.
state_description.grid_stability_index: A health score (0.0 to 1.0) where 1.0 is perfectly stable and < 0.7 indicates risk of blackout.
